description: Variable definitions for Reconciliation Transaction - Popup designs (Edit/Delete HC flows)

variables.Heading/H4: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 24, weight: 500, lineHeight: 1.2, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Heading/H5: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 20, weight: 500, lineHeight: 1.2, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Body/Regular: Font(family: Pridi, style: Regular, size: 16, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Table header: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 13, weight: 500, lineHeight: 100, letterSpacing: 2.3)
variables.Table body: Font(family: Pridi, style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1, letterSpacing: 2.2)
variables.Form Label: Font(family: Pridi, style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, lineHeight: 100, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Form Label 2: Font(family: Pridi, style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 100, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Focus Ring/Default: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: #0D6EFD40, offset: (0, 0), radius: 0, spread: 4)
variables.Title 1: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 16, weight: 500, lineHeight: 100, letterSpacing: 2.2)
variables.Body/Small: Font(family: Pridi, style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 2.5)
variables.Title 2: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 15, weight: 500, lineHeight: 100, letterSpacing: 2.2)
variables.Heading/H6: Font(family: Pridi, style: Medium, size: 16, weight: 500, lineHeight: 1.2, letterSpacing: 2.5)
